title: Casearia eichleriana
taxonomy: Casearia eichleriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Salicaceae, native to the tropical regions of South America. It belongs to the genus Casearia, which comprises around 70 species of trees and shrubs. The Salicaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as willows or willow family. The classification of Casearia eichleriana is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis. The species is classified within the order Malpighiales, which is a group of flowering plants that are known for their diverse range of species and characteristics.
